description: Deliberate, test-gated dependency updates for Flair. Updates are PRs only (never auto-merged) and respect a supply-chain cooldown (minimumReleaseAge) that matches the dep-ages bake-time guard in scripts/check-dep-ages.mjs. See docs/supply-chain-policy.md.

packageRules.description: Group all non-major updates into one PR per run to keep review surface small. Each still goes through the full test suite + K&S review before merge.
Major updates land as their own PRs — they carry the most behavioral risk and deserve isolated review.
Workspace-internal @tpsdev-ai/* deps are version-locked to what each workspace package ships (enforced by check-workspace-deps.mjs) and bumped by the release process, not Renovate.

Keep-current allow-list — mirrors scripts/check-dep-ages.mjs DEFAULT_KEEP_CURRENT. These are tightly coupled to Flair runtime correctness (Harper / embedding fixes); we accept the bake-time risk and pull them eagerly, so Renovate skips the cooldown for them too. Keep this list in lockstep with the script and docs/supply-chain-policy.md.

schedule: before 9am on the first day of the month
